# init(radius:)

**Initializer**

Initializes a circular obstacle with the specified radius.

## Declaration

```swift
init(radius: Float)
```

## Parameters

- **radius**: The radius for the new obstacle.

## Return Value

A circular obstacle.

## Discussion

To make agents avoid the obstacle, create a goal with the goalToAvoidObstacles:timeBeforeCollisionToAvoid: method.

For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].
